name: Deadwood 1876
description: Deadwood 1876 is Facade Games' Wild West entry in the Dark Cities series — outlaws, lawmen, and gamblers of the gold-rush town vie for stagecoach loot, saloon control, and the chance to gun down their rivals before the marshal arrives. Hidden roles, six-shooter standoffs, dust-bowl bluffing. Another lavish faux-leather book-box, this time with bandit's-mask-shaped reminders.
